rulings.Case Title: KIM KONAMI VS. ARYAN DAVANI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Annika Rodriguez For Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 20, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT ANNIKA RODRIGUEZ Motion Of Defendant Annika Rodriguez For Attorneys Fees GRANTED as requested. This defendant is a prevailing party vis-à-vis plaintiff in this action. CCP 1032(a)(4) "a defendant as against those plaintiff who do not recover any relief against that defendant." She is entitled to recover her fees under SFRO 37.9(f) as she was sued as "a person who willfully assists the landlord to endeavor to recover possession or to evict a tenant¿") SFRO 37.9(e). DeSaulles v. Community Hospital of Monterey Peninsula (2016) 62 Cal.4th 1140 is inapplicable. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MUHAMMAD SHAHZAD KHAN VS. NIKOLAOS MASTROKYRIAKOS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 20, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANTS NIKOLAOS MASTROKYRIAKOS, ANA MASTROKYRIAKOS' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Adjudication DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist, e.g. 2 and 7. Objections to paragraph 11 and 12 of Khan's declaration is overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DENISE BEATTY VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 20, 2019 line 5. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Expunge Lis Pendens GRANTED. Plaintiff failed to show probable validity of her claims. Evidence, judicially noticeable materials, and prior actions show that Plaintiff cannot prevail on her claims. The Court notes that the claims largely contract, not real property. = (501/REQ)
